description.en: CoMaps is a community-led, free and open-source offline maps and navigation app based on OpenStreetMap data, built with a focus on privacy (no tracking, no ads) and being not-for-profit. It offers offline maps, search, turn-by-turn navigation for walking, cycling and driving, outdoor/hiking features, bookmarks, track recording and a built-in OSM editor. CoMaps is a fork of Organic Maps.
